# Full Wizard DNS Interactive Mock — stdin input sequence
# Used by tests/full_wizard_interactive_mock.py Test H
#
# Menu flow:
#   2 = Skip VPS
#   1 = Configure DNS (yes)
#   example.com = zone name
#   nanobk-node = node prefix
#   203.0.113.10 = IPv4
#   2001:db8::10 = IPv6
#   2 = DNS check: no
#   2 = Skip Cloudflare
#   2 = Skip Bot
#   2 = Skip Web

2
1
example.com
nanobk-node
203.0.113.10
2001:db8::10
2
2
2
2
